examples: Arthritis and rheumatism are prominent crippling diseases.
Rheumatism affects people living in damp localities.
He moved very slowly because he suffered from rheumatism.
Weak from scurvy and rheumatism, Sneden scratched away in his shorthand diary, obsessively documenting everything he witnessed.
Sukemi suffers from gastric trouble and rheumatism, especially when she doesn't get much sleep.
